Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 

75 
DME_CHRG_AMT 
LABEL: 
Durable Medical Equipment (DME) Charge Amount ($) 
DESCRIPTION: The charge amount (rounded to whole dollars) for durable medical equipment (DME) (purchase of new 
DME and rentals) related to the beneficiary's stay. 
SHORT NAME: DME_AMT 
LONG NAME: DME_CHRG_AMT 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
MedPAR (derived) 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
This field is derived by accumulating
